commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Nadab the son of Jeroboam began to reign over Israel in the second year of Asa king of Judah, and reigned over Israel two years. Two years, incomplete; since he commenced his reign in the second, and died in the third year of Asa, ver. (Calmet) Petau only allows him, "a few months "and supposes, that he had been associated on the throne with Jeroboam. But this is unnecessary. (Houbigant) Nadab was the first king of Israel, who fell a prey to the fury of his subjects. (Salien, the year before Christ 971.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
